content:
The main thing I am against is hearing that +12 is "adding an overlooked function that loops back into normal play"

Isn't that pr speak for "this completes the kit" ? 

It should be added to the base kit. If the axiom is a win more effect then it might be ok.

But then light said he doesnt want to just added numbers. So it will be a function gate of some kind.

But honestly why do all that in the first place when there are so many other choices available. +12 should be the last option honestly.

But hey light said he will take responsibility if something breaks. 

I wanna see what that responsibility is like when we cross that bridge.
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
From what i understood its closer to "Giving purpose to +12 but that doesnt affect the overrall gameplay"
I think like the players the devs are aware this is not a good change but because they are so limited on budget and time they are willing to risk it
I dont think this will pay off in the end but well its a done deal at this point
Regarding responsibility im pretty sure this means if characters are regarded as dependant on their +12 they will buff the base kit even if that make the character op to close the gap
other than that i dont see how you can "take responsibility" this is a gacha game you cant nerf things your player base used money to acquire, its not like they can compensate for every mistake
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
That is exactly how I feel so I want to see what their words mean by "taking responsibility".

As for risking it, I still believe that the current morimens model is fine. They just needed advertisement. There was no need to stir the pot at all. But alas.
thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
感覺目前忘卻的機制有點混亂：
1. 明明可以利用+4~+12來逐步調整強度與趣味性，如+4、+8、+12各有不同的機制加強，非單純堆數值。

2. 現在就像將完全型態拆分到鑰令、啟靈、命輪，沒有一個清楚定義，變成舊角逐漸跟不上新環境，但也不知道怎麼調整，疊加了數值但也跟不上環境。

3. 腳色強度是要對應遊戲環境甚至是故事進度，真要營運不是只能賣角色、腳色強度，重要的是幻衣(造型)，你游的美術風格要好好利用起來阿！像1999就有不同程度的禮包，甚至是遊戲UI外框、勳章之類的也可以作為+12的額外贈送等等。

4. 常駐角（從最少人使用的開始）可以很好做調整的地方，生產力低沒問題，慢慢調整這樣對遊戲後期發展也比較清楚

期望忘卻能作為遊戲長青樹存活的小玩家的建議。

thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content: You are 100% correct. As someone who recommended this game heavily among friends, explaining the gacha system, OE was already a deal-breaker for many. Even with my assurance that this game is generous and very good for light/mid spenders, as we're usually spenders in gacha we like, there was a significant resitance to this idea. Now I know I will simply NOT recommend this game anymore, because telling people 'oh, yeah, there is also ADDITIONAL thing you can unlock at 16 copies, but don't worry, it's not important, promise' would just grant me a clown status. This isn't a hoyo-like game where you can have one overpowered e6 unit (until it's powercrept) and clean the game with it. This is a game that requires multiple units and where building and composing teams is part of the fun. And like I've said, this dev team IS NOT good at listening to player's feedback regarding kits. There are plenty of units (not only standard, but limited), that feel awful to play and nothing has been done with it so far. This +12 bs is not a solution to anything, it just messes up the game's economy and frankly, I just have hard time believing that there won't be overpowered +12 buffs, even 'by accident'. And once it's in the game, it's stays in the game, which was communicated rather plainly here.

thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
認真想問，你們會不會考慮重製蘿坦
我不知道你們是考慮到超限百分比固傷佔模還是什麼原因
至少這一年遲遲蘿坦沒看到有什麼有效提升，反而是被靈塑及最終法則各種嚴格控制出牌順序

另外是技能組完全是蘿坦上位提升版的茉夏，蘿坦表現不佳問題都是其次了

既然可以接受茉夏這種算是此版本相對超模的上位蘿坦替代角色了，這兩隻角色技能設計接近完全相同的情況下，蘿坦身上的各種毒點問題，放在茉夏設計上都修改解決了，數值提升更是相當於蘿坦帶了一兩隻大拐，哪怕你們後續以蘿坦原來技能組調整基礎能力也總不可能超過茉夏，那麼蘿坦這個角色到底是顧忌什麼遲遲沒有考慮調整? 

~~把上位設計給茉夏了，sp蘿坦用什麼~~

你前面說過最终法则会让这个唤醒体拥有合理而有趣的实力提升，但蘿坦這部分我是真沒覺得合理，而且也不怎麼有趣，(綁定防禦牌，就平平無奇，本身也沒過牌顯得觸發條件過於曲折苛刻，收益本身又算是偏低那種，甚至又是限定本回合生效那種超搶出牌調和設計)，反而出牌順序還多了一條件要求，甚至茉夏的存在讓蘿坦在獨特性方面也有所缺失，你們有考慮過重製蘿坦嗎
